# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket to store application assets. Configure the bucket for public read access so our website can serve static files (images, CSS, JavaScript). Keep the template simple for quick deployment.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'

Resources:
  MyS3Bucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub 'my-s3-bucket-${AWS::AccountId}'

  S3Policy:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy'
    DependsOn: MyS3Bucket
    Properties:
      PolicyName: my-s3-policy
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: ReadAccessFromWebServer
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                Fn::Sub: 's3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
            Action: 's3:GetObject'
            Resource:
              Fn::Join:
                - ''
                -
                  - 'arn:aws:s3:::'
                  - { BucketName: Ref: MyS3Bucket }
                  - '/*'

Outputs:
  S3BucketName:
    Value: !Ref MyS3Bucket
    Description: The name of the S3 bucket created.
